daily_plan_req: Sam Moore takes a walk around Johnson Park, sits at Hobbs Cafe reading, and campaigns for the mayoral election.
name: Sam Moore
learned: Sam Moore is a retired navy officer running for mayor. Given his military background and practical life experience, he operates strictly in reality. He views Tom's conspiracy theories as desperate, pathetic smear campaigns.
currently: Sam Moore is spending his free time tending the park and actively campaigning for local mayor. He is trying to keep the town's focus on real civic issues despite the crazy rumors being spread about him.
lifestyle: Sam Moore goes to bed around 9pm, awakes up around 5am, eats dinner around 5pm.
